name: refine-gate
description: Prompt-binding gate for Claude Code: a UserPromptSubmit hook detects prompts carrying unbound references ("the SSE solution", "like before", "still broken") or ungrounded work requests, and injects the /refine procedure — build a binding table with evidence, separate symptom from goal, select an execution strategy from a research-backed table (15 strategies verified against 2024-2026 literature, counter-evidence included), and define acceptance criteria as external signals.
